name: Stickman Army 2
description: The most epic stickman war game is now available. Enter the arena and contest the fearless army as-sault! Join the campaign bootcamp to fight against foe after foe. Think you can be a challenger or contender in this crusade? Play "Stickman Army : The Resistance" now and create your own legacy! Show how fearless you are by defeating the guerrilla crusade by shooting them one by one! Build a base that can be well defended and strike back with a campaign of bloody as-sault!
